changes_made: Changed k8s_networkpolicy_tls_enforced to k8s_networkpolicy_tls_required for clarity
review_notes: The functions generally map well to the control AC-4(17) by focusing on secure communication channels in Kubernetes. The naming convention is mostly followed, but a slight adjustment was made to improve clarity and consistency. The functions are technically accurate and align with Kubernetes security practices.
naming_improvements: Use 'tls_required' instead of 'tls_enforced' for network policies to better reflect the action
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | domain authentication nist sp 800-53, r ev
step1_reasoning: The control AC-4(17) focuses on enforcing secure information flow through domain authentication mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure communication channels and enforcing TLS for API server communications, ingress traffic, and service mesh interactions. NetworkPolicies can also be used to enforce secure communication within the cluster.
